name: Prevent staff from seeing Cost Prices
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can protect sensitive pricing and profitability information by configuring security profile and POS security settings to prevent specific staff roles from viewing cost prices, gross profit margins, and markup percentages throughout "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": ". This helps maintain appropriate information access controls, ensuring junior staff and sales personnel can process transactions effectively without accessing confidential financial data that should be restricted to management and accounting roles."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Properly restricting cost price visibility through both back office profile security and POS security features helps retail operators protect competitive pricing strategies and supplier cost information while maintaining efficient operations across different staff responsibility levels."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To prevent users from seeing Cost Prices, you will need to update both the "}, {"text": "Security Profile"}, {"text": " and the "}, {"text": "POS Security Profile Settings"}, {"text": ", covered in more detail below."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Security Profile"}], "data-id": "security-profile"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Security in Retail Express is based on people's roles within the business. A "}, {"text": "Security Profile"}, {"text": " can be created for each role and then users in that role are attached to the profile for the role."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To block a staff role from accessing cost price and profit information, edit the Security Profile for their role and make sure you remove the tick from all items in the list below that has \"Access to Costs\" marked as YES."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Feature", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children":
